posters.title: SaaS Landing Page Redesign
posters.description: Redesign the home page for a modern cloud analytics platform. Focus on building trust, communicating key value propositions, and optimizing the call-to-action sections.
posters.author: Intermediate

posters.title: Dark Mode Dashboard
posters.description: Create a high-density, dark mode dashboard layout for server resource statistics, active log streams, and container health metrics.
posters.author: Advanced

posters.title: Fintech Mobile Checkout Flow
posters.description: Design a seamless mobile multi-step checkout flow for international bank transfers. Ensure clear currency exchange conversions and payment status feedback.
posters.author: Advanced

posters.title: E-Learning Dashboard
posters.description: Build an online class hub UI for young learners. Emphasize bright and inviting colors, game-like progress badges, and direct navigation keys.
posters.author: Easy

posters.title: Smart Home App Control Panel
posters.description: Create a unified control interface for domestic heating, audio speakers, and indoor ambient lighting. Prioritize clear tap and slide control widgets.
posters.author: Intermediate
